name: v1_i_did_the_sweep
main: THE FEDS DIDN'T DO A SWEEP
left: a credit report tradeline page stamped VERIFIED in red, deep shadow, the dead-end the bureau keeps returning
right: an FTC affidavit page stamped BLOCKED with a small green official seal and a 605B reference tag, clean and authoritative
expression: calm, knowing, a slight controlled half-smile, eyes steady on camera

name: v1_verified_not_final
sub: THE FTC AFFIDAVIT FORCES A BLOCK
left: the same credit account stamped VERIFIED in red, shadowed, a dead end
right: the exact same account now stamped BLOCKED in green with a small FTC seal and a 605B tag

name: v1_three_bankruptcies
right: one dim Equifax-style report panel set to one side behind him, three bankruptcy lines struck through, a small green REMOVED chip and one clean score field, kept secondary to his face
expression: intense, direct, locked eye contact, no smile

name: v1_went_dark
left: a dim phone screen showing a stack of incoming comments still arriving over months, soft grey message bars with a single legible word SWEEP and one small unread dot, no other legible text
expression: serious, no smile, a slight forward lean, quiet intensity
